accountNumber.description: The unique identifier for the bank account.

accountHolderName.description: The name of the person who holds the account.

balance.description: The current balance of the bank account.

currency.description: The currency in which the account is held.

branchCode.description: The code of the branch where the account is held.

createdDate.description: The date when the account was created.

isActive.description: Indicates whether the account is active.
